declaredFeatures: Create support ticket drafts after user confirmation
Show support request status in App Home

aiDisclosure.model: OpenAI or Anthropic model configured by workspace admin
aiDisclosure.retention: Prompts and responses are retained for 30 days for support debugging unless disabled by an admin.
aiDisclosure.trainingUse: Slack customer data is not used to train foundation models.

scopeJustifications.im:history: Read only the direct conversation where the user is interacting with the support agent.

humanReviewControls: The user previews and confirms every support ticket before creation.

runtimeEvidence.description: Automated test rejects unsigned Slack requests.
